Defendants Edward Yee And Jenny Granados' Motion For Sanctions, Attorneys Fees And Costs Against Plaintiff
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendants Edward Yee And Jenny Granados' Motion For Sanctions, Attorneys Fees And Costs Against Plaintiff is Granted in part. The Court orders Plaintiff to pay Defendants $956 which the Court finds are expenses actually incurred solely because of the cancellation. This amount includes $155 for Defendant Granados's non-refundable airfare, $166 change fee for Defendants' counsel's flight, $135 for the filing fee and CourtCall service fee and $500 in attorney fees for making this motion. The Court finds that additional sanctions are not warranted. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
